TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Matt_Aitch, title = Matt_Aitch, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Matt_Aitch} }

S.FORM: Matt Aitch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Matt Aitch, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) pinqbaqan nya Matt Aitch, t'aring kawas tay 1963 tehuk kawas tay 1965, mqwas biru sa Moberly Area CC pqwsan biru krahu. t'aring kawas tay 1965 tehuk kawas tay 1967, mqwas biru sa Michigan State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Matt Aitch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 9, Matt Aitch, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2007) pinqbaqan nya Matt Aitch, t'aring kawas tay 1963 tehuk kawas tay 1965, mqwas biru sa Moberly Area CC pqwsan biru krahu. t'aring kawas tay 1965 tehuk kawas tay 1967, mqwas biru sa Michigan State pqwsan biru krahu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) pinqő≤aqan nja matt ait ¶~ ®ńß, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa moő≤erlj area ¶~ ® ¶~ ® pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk kawas~…ē taj ****, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa mi ¶~ ®ńßi…£an s~…ētate pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
